name: TaskInstanceCollectionResponse
description:
Task instance collection response supporting both offset and cursor pagination.

A single flat model is used instead of a discriminated union
(``Annotated[Offset | Cursor, Field(discriminator=...)]``) because
the OpenAPI ``oneOf`` + ``discriminator`` construct is not handled
correctly by ``@hey-api/openapi-ts`` / ``@7nohe/openapi-react-query-codegen``:
return types degrade to ``unknown`` in JSDoc and can produce
incorrect TypeScript types (see hey-api/openapi-ts#1613, #3270).

total_entries.title: Total Entries
total_entries.description: Total number of matching items. Populated for offset pagination, ``null`` when using cursor pagination.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Token pointing to the next page. Populated for cursor pagination, ``null`` when using offset pagination or when there is no next page.

previous_cursor.title: Previous Cursor
previous_cursor.description: Token pointing to the previous page. Populated for cursor pagination, ``null`` when using offset pagination or when on the first page.
